[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001010100 3
1 001000010 2
2 100010010 3
3 011001110 5
4 011101101 6
5 011010110 5

7 100111010 5
